extraction.one_line_summary: EWAN Caleb surged from BENNETT Sam's slipstream in final 200m on uphill drag, won from seemingly nowhere after appearing non-competitive.
tactical_patterns: EWAN deliberately sat behind BENNETT until final 200m on uphill drag, concealing form before explosive acceleration.
HAMILTON Lucas and MEYER Cam led IMPEY Daryl's train but IMPEY launched too early on right boards, fading before line.
MORKOV Michael positioned BENNETT Sam perfectly, but Bennett cracked on uphill finish despite optimal leadout placement.

rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: positive: disguised readiness in slipstream before devastating uphill sprint, suggesting peakedness and tactical maturity absent day prior
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: negative: cracked on gradual uphill drag despite perfect MORKOV leadout, revealing climbing deficit in sprint finishes
rider_signals.IMPEY Daryl: neutral: went long on right boards with MITCHELTON-SCOTT train support but distance judgment flawed on gradual climb
rider_signals.HAAS Nathan: positive: finished strong enough for bonus seconds on uphill finish without dedicated leadout
rider_signals.DENNIS Rohan: negative: poorly timed puncture suggests mechanical vulnerability or positioning carelessness in crucial phase
